phoneticUs: nﾊ翰埵ﾉ騨腎ﾉ冦i; njﾊ翰埵ﾉ騨腎ﾉ冦i
meaning: n.[蛹ｻ]逾樒ｻ丞夌譁ｭ譛ｯ,逾樒ｻ剰ｧ｣蜑門ｭｦ
examples: Conclusion: Tibial neurotomy has a high utility value in treating equinovarus in children with cerebral palsy.
Conclusion Selective peripheral neurotomy is an effective and safe microsurgical method for the treatment of spasticity.
Conclusion Neurotomy is an effective method to treat talipes equinovarus, and can improve the motor activity of low extremity.
